name: toefl-ibt-speaking-coach
description: A domain harness for a TOEFL iBT speaking coach that diagnoses, drills, and provides evidence-based feedback with memory to help learners achieve a 24+ score.

modelTiers.smart: the strongest available reasoning tier for judgement-heavy work
modelTiers.fast: a quick tier for routing, bookkeeping, and mechanical checks

memory.promotion: After each session, promote the most salient weakness and the highest-confidence improvement path to long-term memory for adaptive study planning.
